message: Update to 1.2.0 - School accounting, teacher class assign, auto timetable, smart fee reminders. Close Nova, install UPDATE NOW, then reopen.
releaseNotes: 1.2.0 final-prep - Fiscal accountancy (fee types, structures, student ledger, discounts, partial pay, print bills), Principal teacher class assignment + Teacher HQ live classes, Temporal_Grid auto routine with conflict detection, Smart Fee Reminder drafts (EN/NP copy), academic year rollover stub. Includes cloud sync boolean-to-integer fix for Supabase.
